market_summary.KOSPI: Surged 4.39% to 5,638.20, rebounding above 5,600 following eased U.S.-Iran tensions and recovery in New York markets.

art_highlights.detail: Fair runs March 27-29 at HKCEC, with previews March 25-26. Features 240 galleries and new 'Echoes' sector.
Promoting Art Basel connections and digital art accessibility via The Frame TVs, offering thousands of works including curated collections.
